scripts.build: pnpm --filter @lumal/icons build && pnpm --filter @lumal/icons-vue build && pnpm --filter @lumal/core build && pnpm --filter @lumal/charts build && pnpm --filter @lumal/datav build && pnpm --filter @lumal/cockpit build && pnpm --filter @lumal/vben-compat build && pnpm --filter @lumal/vite build && pnpm --filter create-lumal-admin build && pnpm --filter lumal-mock-api build
scripts.cockpit:deps: pnpm --filter @lumal/icons build && pnpm --filter @lumal/icons-vue build && pnpm --filter @lumal/core build && pnpm --filter @lumal/charts build && pnpm --filter @lumal/datav build && pnpm --filter @lumal/cockpit build
scripts.datav-guide:deps: pnpm --filter @lumal/icons build && pnpm --filter @lumal/icons-vue build && pnpm --filter @lumal/core build && pnpm --filter @lumal/datav build
scripts.deploy:check: pnpm docs:build && pnpm cockpit:build && pnpm datav-guide:build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @lumal/icons typecheck && pnpm --filter @lumal/icons build && pnpm --filter @lumal/icons-vue typecheck && pnpm --filter @lumal/icons-vue build && pnpm --filter @lumal/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @lumal/core build && pnpm --filter @lumal/charts typecheck && pnpm --filter @lumal/datav typecheck && pnpm --filter @lumal/datav build && pnpm --filter @lumal/cockpit typecheck && pnpm --filter @lumal/cockpit build && pnpm --filter @lumal/vben-compat typecheck && pnpm --filter @lumal/vite typecheck && pnpm --filter create-lumal-admin typecheck && pnpm --filter lumal-mock-api typecheck && pnpm --filter lumal-cockpit typecheck && pnpm --filter lumal-datav-guide typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm test:scripts && pnpm --filter @lumal/icons test && pnpm --filter @lumal/icons build && pnpm --filter @lumal/icons-vue test && pnpm --filter @lumal/icons-vue build && pnpm --filter @lumal/core test && pnpm --filter @lumal/core build && pnpm --filter @lumal/charts test && pnpm --filter @lumal/charts build && pnpm --filter @lumal/datav test && pnpm --filter @lumal/datav build && pnpm --filter @lumal/cockpit test && pnpm --filter @lumal/cockpit build && pnpm --filter @lumal/vben-compat test && pnpm --filter @lumal/vite test && pnpm --filter create-lumal-admin test && pnpm --filter lumal-mock-api test && pnpm --filter lumal-admin test && pnpm --filter lumal-cockpit test
scripts.pack:dry-run: pnpm --filter @lumal/icons pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @lumal/icons-vue pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @lumal/core pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @lumal/charts pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @lumal/datav pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @lumal/cockpit pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @lumal/vben-compat pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @lumal/vite pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter create-lumal-admin pack --dry-run
scripts.release:check: pnpm lint && pnpm release:boundaries && pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm admin:build && pnpm compat:build && pnpm release:artifacts && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm pack:dry-run
